docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 66017996)

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON, ALVIN THE ALVIN JACKSON AND SHERRY DENHAM JACKSON LIVING TRUST, BY AND THROUGH TRUSTORS ALVIN JACKSON AND SHERRY DENHAM JACKSON JACKSON, SHERRY DENHAM THE ALVIN JACKSON AND SHERRY DENHAM JACKSON LIVING TRUST, BY AND THROUGH TRUSTORS ALVIN JACKSON AND SHERRY DENHAM JACKSON AS TO DEFENDANT CSAA FIRE & CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-16-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-15-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-24-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-16-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-28-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-28-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-15-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
